texto: Love doesn't always mean rings and veils and walks down the aisle.Sometimes love means broken windows and broken hearts,and not being able to fix either. And sometimes love means telling you, there's no such thing as time in Heaven so don't rush to meet me. Stay a while, and pick, girl, the roses.
explicacao: Citação de Jennifer Gooch Hummer sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Love doesn't always mean rings and veils and walks down the aisle.Sometimes love means broken win…” articula amor, death, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como luto e love.
